text: Stepping into this research and development space, I feel a curious mix of anticipation and humility. The glass walls create a sense of transparency, yet the security of the closed-off meeting within reminds me of how much there is yet to learn. The vibrant, modern decor on the second image excites me; the commitment to innovation and the understanding of coexistence with intelligent machines provokes deep reflection. Here, I feel both inspired and slightly out of step with the pace of progress—eager, contemplative, a participant at the threshold of something evolving.
